# Tang Yu Portfolio Website - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
Personal tech and leadership portfolio website for Tang Yu - showcasing technical skills, leadership experience, and SITCON Camp application.

## Tech Stack
- React + TypeScript with Vite
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- React Router for navigation
- Framer Motion for animations

## Design System
- Primary Color: Deep Blue (#1e3a8a)
- Secondary Color: White (#ffffff)
- Accent Color: Cyan/Teal (#06b6d4)
- Fonts: Noto Sans TC (Chinese), Inter/Poppins (English)

## Pages to Build
1. Home (Hero + Stats)
2. Skills (Programming, IT Support, Tools, Soft Skills)
3. Experience (Timeline)
4. Projects (Project Cards + GitHub Link)
5. Why SITCON (Mission Statement + Features)
6. Contact (Email, GitHub, Instagram)

## Progress Checklist
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions (None needed)
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task (Dev server running on port 5173)
- [x] Launch the Project (Live on localhost:5173)
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
